title: Mining Tool Requirements
quickAnswer: Tool tier matters. Stone handles basic ores, iron is needed for redstone, gold, and diamonds, and better picks mainly improve speed, durability, and enchant potential.
keyFacts: If the tool tier is too low, some blocks break without dropping their intended resource.
Iron picks are the main threshold for mid-game mining because they unlock several valuable ores at once.
Fortune boosts yield on many ores, while Silk Touch is better when you want the block itself for later processing.
commonMistakes: Reaching diamonds or redstone with the wrong pick tier and expecting the ore to drop normally.
Upgrading to a better pick but ignoring enchantments, which matter more than raw tier once basic access is solved.
